name: kale-deploy
description: Kale Deploy assistant adapter for building Kale-compatible Cloudflare apps.

interface.shortDescription: Build and deploy apps that fit the Kale runtime.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that teaches the Kale Deploy runtime and provides command surfaces for scaffolding, diagnosing, adapting, and connecting Kale-compatible projects.
defaultPrompt: Use Kale Deploy to build me a small web app.
Scaffold and deploy a Kale-compatible survey tool.
Make this Worker fit Kale Deploy and push it live.
Inspect this repo for Kale readiness and fix what is missing.
Adapt this existing project so it fits Kale Deploy without rebuilding it.
